name: iina-learn-from-subtitles
description: IINA plugin that pops a vocabulary lookup for the current English subtitle line — pick your AI provider, customize the prompt, learn while you watch.
author: Abdullah Elbedwehy

scripts.pack: npm run build && rm -rf release/subtitle-lookup.iinaplugin release/subtitle-lookup.iinaplgz && mkdir -p release/subtitle-lookup.iinaplugin && cp Info.json pref.html release/subtitle-lookup.iinaplugin/ && cp -R dist release/subtitle-lookup.iinaplugin/dist && cd release && zip -qry subtitle-lookup.iinaplgz subtitle-lookup.iinaplugin
